name: io.github.domirep/the-floor
description: Agent-readable and agent-playable data for The Floor ($FLOOR), an on-chain Wall Street strategy game on Robinhood Chain. Read live desks, alpha, emissions, reinvest-vs-dump behavior, and per-wallet strategy math; prepare (unsigned) transactions to join, recruit, upgrade, collect, and swap ETH for FLOOR. Unofficial fan-built companion to thefloor.sh.
